criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app adapts to individual user needs, preferences, and goals using AI.

criteria.name: AI Technology
criteria.description: Types of AI technologies employed by the app, such as machine learning, natural language processing, computer vision, or generative AI.

criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The range of features and capabilities offered by the app, including workout planning, nutrition tracking, mental health support, or general assistance.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: The ease of use, intuitiveness, and overall design of the app's user interface.

criteria.name: Data Sources
criteria.description: The variety and reliability of data sources used by the app to provide insights and recommendations, including wearable device integration, user input, and external databases.
